{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Manager, Operations Integration and Channels",
  "description": "MTN Nigeria - The leader in telecommunications in Nigeria, and a part of a diverse community in Africa and the Middle East, our brand is instantly recognisable. It is through our compelling brand that we are able to attract the right talents who we carefully nurture by continuously improving our employment offerings even beyond reward and recognition.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Manager, Operations Integration and Channels

Job Identification: 7093
Job Location: Nigeria
Job Schedule: Full time
Job Category: MTN Level 3
Reports To: Senior Manager - Application and Integration
Division:&nbsp;Information Technology

Mission


	End to end impact analysis of new solutions accessing the impact to multiple systems, infrastructure and business processes.
	Support the delivery of new solutions through reviews, analysis, integration recommendations, technology advances and software evaluation.
	Define and implement process enhancements across IS applications and impacted business units.
	Analysis, design, development, maintenance, and modification of existing/new solutions.


Description


	Provide quality support in the analysis, design, development, maintenance, and modification of existing/new solutions.
	Assist in developing application development and management frameworks, processes and procedures in line with the MTN standards and in alignment with MTNN&rsquo;s corporate goals and objectives for ICT.&nbsp;
	Analyze and design applications based on business, technical and system requirements and oversee the implementation of the solutions, ensuring the minimization of manual touch points in the application.
	Develop the project scope, problem statement and goal statement, assist with project-planning and co-ordinate input and maintain plans throughout project life cycle.&nbsp;
	Monitor and maintain the performance of applications within the business, ensuring constraints and new requirements are documented and updates are created accordingly.
	Participate in the selection of suitable technologies and determine appropriate technologies that are effective and efficient and in line with approved rules and procedures.&nbsp;
	Manage and provide direction for the application team in support of business operations and ensure that operational delivery of system outputs is met in line with OLAs and SLAs.
	Review applications and ensure availability of operational recovery strategies and mechanism.
	Support the delivery of new solutions through reviews, analysis, integration recommendations, and technology advice and software evaluation.
	Understand the architecture of existing Business Support Applications across IS, including interfaces among the applications.


Requirements
Education:


	First Degree in Computer Science or related field from a reputable institution
	Fluent in English
	Master&rsquo;s degree in related field will be an added advantage
	RDBMS Certification such as Oracle Certified Professional.&nbsp;&nbsp;
	Unix/Windows training/certification.
	Project Management training/certification
	Javal/Perl Scripting Training/Certification
	ITIL Foundation certification &ndash; desired


Experience:
6-13 years&rsquo; experience which includes:


	Minimum of 3 years of experience in an area of specialization; with experience in supervising/managing others.
	Experience working in a medium to large organization.
	In-depth understanding of Telco infrastructure and processes.
	Development skills in more than one programming language e.g. PL/SQL, Java etc. and industry standard RDBMS (Oracle or MS SQL).&nbsp;
	Analytical and logical approach to solving problems.
	Good understanding of programming constructs to explain and interpret programs and supervise development and deployment of applications through test, UAT to production using ITIL standards.&nbsp;
	Experience supporting vendor developed applications.
	Ability to suggest solutions to application&rsquo;s problem. Work with vendors at arriving and implementing solutions identified.&nbsp;
	Project Management experience is required
	Practical experience of IT best practices ITIL, eTom NGOSS and SDLC.
	Demonstrate continuous effort to improve operations, decrease turnaround times, streamline work processes, and work cooperatively and jointly to provide quality seamless customer service
	Design, implement databases (create and maintain tables, views, packages, etc.), and administer and support databases
	Ability to analyze reported incidents and apply the appropriate solution to the known problem
	Able to evaluate the utility and relevance of features and functions of various web sites, software applications or products to determine how they could be applied to enhance existing solutions.
	Knowledge of SAN, Clustering, server configuration, LAN, WAN, distributed systems etc.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-12",
  "validThrough": "2026-03-21",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "MTN Nigeria"
    
  },

    }

Manager, Operations Integration and Channels Job at MTN Nigeria




        
    

        
        MTN Nigeria - The leader in telecommunications in Nigeria, and a part of a diverse community in Africa and the Middle East, our brand is instantly recognisable. It is through our compelling brand that we are able to attract the right talents who we carefully nurture by continuously improving our employment offerings even beyond reward and recognition.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Manager, Operations Integration and Channels

Job Identification: 7093
Job Location: Nigeria
Job Schedule: Full time
Job Category: MTN Level 3
Reports To: Senior Manager - Application and Integration
Division: Information Technology

Mission
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	End to end impact analysis of new solutions accessing the impact to multiple systems, infrastructure and business processes.
	Support the delivery of new solutions through reviews, analysis, integration recommendations, technology advances and software evaluation.
	Define and implement process enhancements across IS applications and impacted business units.
	Analysis, design, development, maintenance, and modification of existing/new solutions.


Description


	Provide quality support in the analysis, design, development, maintenance, and modification of existing/new solutions.
	Assist in developing application development and management frameworks, processes and procedures in line with the MTN standards and in alignment with MTNN’s corporate goals and objectives for ICT. 
	Analyze and design applications based on business, technical and system requirements and oversee the implementation of the solutions, ensuring the minimization of manual touch points in the application.
	Develop the project scope, problem statement and goal statement, assist with project-planning and co-ordinate input and maintain plans throughout project life cycle. 
	Monitor and maintain the performance of applications within the business, ensuring constraints and new requirements are documented and updates are created accordingly.
	Participate in the selection of suitable technologies and determine appropriate technologies that are effective and efficient and in line with approved rules and procedures. 
	Manage and provide direction for the application team in support of business operations and ensure that operational delivery of system outputs is met in line with OLAs and SLAs.
	Review applications and ensure availability of operational recovery strategies and mechanism.
	Support the delivery of new solutions through reviews, analysis, integration recommendations, and technology advice and software evaluation.
	Understand the architecture of existing Business Support Applications across IS, including interfaces among the applications.


Requirements
Education:


	First Degree in Computer Science or related field from a reputable institution
	Fluent in English
	Master’s degree in related field will be an added advantage
	RDBMS Certification such as Oracle Certified Professional.  
	Unix/Windows training/certification.
	Project Management training/certification
	Javal/Perl Scripting Training/Certification
	ITIL Foundation certification – desired


Experience:
6-13 years’ experience which includes:


	Minimum of 3 years of experience in an area of specialization; with experience in supervising/managing others.
	Experience working in a medium to large organization.
	In-depth understanding of Telco infrastructure and processes.
	Development skills in more than one programming language e.g. PL/SQL, Java etc. and industry standard RDBMS (Oracle or MS SQL). 
	Analytical and logical approach to solving problems.
	Good understanding of programming constructs to explain and interpret programs and supervise development and deployment of applications through test, UAT to production using ITIL standards. 
	Experience supporting vendor developed applications.
	Ability to suggest solutions to application’s problem. Work with vendors at arriving and implementing solutions identified. 
	Project Management experience is required
	Practical experience of IT best practices ITIL, eTom NGOSS and SDLC.
	Demonstrate continuous effort to improve operations, decrease turnaround times, streamline work processes, and work cooperatively and jointly to provide quality seamless customer service
	Design, implement databases (create and maintain tables, views, packages, etc.), and administer and support databases
	Ability to analyze reported incidents and apply the appropriate solution to the known problem
	Able to evaluate the utility and relevance of features and functions of various web sites, software applications or products to determine how they could be applied to enhance existing solutions.
	Knowledge of SAN, Clustering, server configuration, LAN, WAN, distributed systems etc.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales Canvasser",
  "description": "CFAO Yamaha Motor Nigeria Limited is a 50 50 joint venture between CFAO, Paris and Yamaha Motor Corporation of Japan Incorporated in April 2015 CFAO Yamaha assembles Crux Rev and FX Royale and markets, distributes and servicesother Yamaha products in Nigeria.

Our products Motorcycles, All terrain vehicles, Outboard motors and water vehicles, Generators, multi purpose engines including water pumps, Spare parts, lubricants and accessories.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Canvasser
Job Location:&nbsp;Nigeria
Employment Type: Part-time

Key Performance Indicators(KPIs)
Sales KPIs:


	Total Units Sold: This is to measure the sales achieved by the canvasser. With a monthly target of 15 units, evaluation will be done on a monthly basis.
	Sales Target Achievement (%): This measures how well the canvasser meets their assigned sales goals. For example, if the target is 15 units and they sell 10, their achievement is 67%, and the evaluation will be done on a monthly basis.
	New Customer Acquisition: This KPI focuses on the canvasser&#39;s ability to find and convert new customers/dealers/fleet owners, which is crucial for market expansion. Evaluation will be done on a weekly basis.


Activity-Based KPIs:


	These KPIs measure the daily and weekly activities that are proven to drive sales. Focusing on these ensures the team is consistently engaged in the right behaviours.
	Number of Dealership Visits: Tracks how many times a canvasser visits potential or existing dealers. This is vital for building relationships and understanding market needs. &ndash; Daily reports required.
	New Leads Generated: Measures the number of new potential customers or dealers identified by the canvasser &ndash; Daily reports required.
	Field Report Submission:&nbsp;This measures the canvasser&#39;s compliance in submitting regular reports, which provide valuable data on market conditions, competitor activities, and challenges. &ndash; Daily reports required.


Salary
N100,000 Monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;aesjobsng@cfao.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Sales Canvasser Job at CFAO Yamaha Motor Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        CFAO Yamaha Motor Nigeria Limited is a 50 50 joint venture between CFAO, Paris and Yamaha Motor Corporation of Japan Incorporated in April 2015 CFAO Yamaha assembles Crux Rev and FX Royale and markets, distributes and servicesother Yamaha products in Nigeria.

Our products Motorcycles, All terrain vehicles, Outboard motors and water vehicles, Generators, multi purpose engines including water pumps, Spare parts, lubricants and accessories.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Canvasser
Job Location: Nigeria
Employment Type: Part-time

Key Performance Indicators(KPIs)
Sales KPIs:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Total Units Sold: This is to measure the sales achieved by the canvasser. With a monthly target of 15 units, evaluation will be done on a monthly basis.
	Sales Target Achievement (%): This measures how well the canvasser meets their assigned sales goals. For example, if the target is 15 units and they sell 10, their achievement is 67%, and the evaluation will be done on a monthly basis.
	New Customer Acquisition: This KPI focuses on the canvasser's ability to find and convert new customers/dealers/fleet owners, which is crucial for market expansion. Evaluation will be done on a weekly basis.


Activity-Based KPIs:


	These KPIs measure the daily and weekly activities that are proven to drive sales. Focusing on these ensures the team is consistently engaged in the right behaviours.
	Number of Dealership Visits: Tracks how many times a canvasser visits potential or existing dealers. This is vital for building relationships and understanding market needs. – Daily reports required.
	New Leads Generated: Measures the number of new potential customers or dealers identified by the canvasser – Daily reports required.
	Field Report Submission: This measures the canvasser's compliance in submitting regular reports, which provide valuable data on market conditions, competitor activities, and challenges. – Daily reports required.


Salary
N100,000 Monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Chief Operating Officer",
  "description": "Cen Global Services Limited (&ldquo;Cen Global&rdquo;) - Our client is&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Chief Operating Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Our client is seeking a highly experienced Chief Operating Officer (COO) to oversee day-to-day operations, optimize processes, and drive organizational efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee daily operations and ensure operational efficiency across departments.
	Develop and implement operational policies, systems, and processes.
	Work closely with executive leadership to drive business strategy.
	Monitor KPIs, performance metrics, and operational risks.
	Lead cross-functional teams to ensure alignment with company objectives.
	Optimize resource allocation and cost management.
	Ensure compliance with regulatory and corporate governance standards.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree and Master&#39;s Degree
	Minimum of 8 years of experience in senior operational leadership.
	Strong background in operations management and process optimization.
	Excellent leadership, decision-making, and problem-solving skills.
	Proven ability to scale operations and manage complex organizations.
	Strong financial and strategic acumen.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and&nbsp;qualified candidates should send their&nbsp;CV&nbsp;and Cover letters to:&nbsp;careers@cenglobalservices.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Chief Operating Officer Job at Cen Global Services Limited




        
    

        
        Cen Global Services Limited (“Cen Global”) - Our client is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Chief Operating Officer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Our client is seeking a highly experienced Chief Operating Officer (COO) to oversee day-to-day operations, optimize processes, and drive organizational efficiency.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Oversee daily operations and ensure operational efficiency across departments.
	Develop and implement operational policies, systems, and processes.
	Work closely with executive leadership to drive business strategy.
	Monitor KPIs, performance metrics, and operational risks.
	Lead cross-functional teams to ensure alignment with company objectives.
	Optimize resource allocation and cost management.
	Ensure compliance with regulatory and corporate governance standards.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor’s Degree and Master's Degree
	Minimum of 8 years of experience in senior operational leadership.
	Strong background in operations management and process optimization.
	Excellent leadership, decision-making, and problem-solving skills.
	Proven ability to scale operations and manage complex organizations.
	Strong financial and strategic acumen.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover letters to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Commercial Excellence Manager",
  "description": "Champion Breweries Plc., incorporated on 31st of July, 1974 strive to maintain and sustain rigorous production standards through the deployment of cutting edge technology and the application of human capital.

Since the launch of our brands in 1976, we have been guided by the sterling values of safety , quality, discipline, people development and team spirit to deliver to our consumers premium quality brands for responsible enjoyment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Commercial Excellence Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Uyo, Akwa Ibom
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports to: Chief Commercial Officer

Key Responsibilities


	Drive commercial growth and excellence across business units
	Develop and execute strategies to improve sales performance and customer engagement
	Analyze market trends, customer needs, and competitor activity
	Lead cross-functional teams to implement commercial initiatives
	Identify and drive process improvements in commercial operations
	Improve customer engagement.


Key Targets


	Achieve the allocated revenue growth for the fiscal year
	Expand the customer base
	Launch two new commercial initiatives per quarter Improve sales forecasting accuracy.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing or any related field
	5+ years of experience in commercial roles, preferably in a leadership position
	MBA added advantage.
	Strong analytical and strategic thinking skills Excellent communication and
	Leadership abilities
	Experience with data analysis and Al-driven tools.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to:&nbsp;recruitment.cbplc@championbreweries.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Commercial Excellence Manager Job at Champion Breweries Plc




        
    

        
        Champion Breweries Plc., incorporated on 31st of July, 1974 strive to maintain and sustain rigorous production standards through the deployment of cutting edge technology and the application of human capital.

Since the launch of our brands in 1976, we have been guided by the sterling values of safety , quality, discipline, people development and team spirit to deliver to our consumers premium quality brands for responsible enjoyment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Commercial Excellence Manager

Job Location: Uyo, Akwa Ibom
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports to: Chief Commercial Officer

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Drive commercial growth and excellence across business units
	Develop and execute strategies to improve sales performance and customer engagement
	Analyze market trends, customer needs, and competitor activity
	Lead cross-functional teams to implement commercial initiatives
	Identify and drive process improvements in commercial operations
	Improve customer engagement.


Key Targets


	Achieve the allocated revenue growth for the fiscal year
	Expand the customer base
	Launch two new commercial initiatives per quarter Improve sales forecasting accuracy.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration, Marketing or any related field
	5+ years of experience in commercial roles, preferably in a leadership position
	MBA added advantage.
	Strong analytical and strategic thinking skills Excellent communication and
	Leadership abilities
	Experience with data analysis and Al-driven tools.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

Quality Control Officer Job at Chilis Restaurant




        
    

        
        Chilis Restaurant is a 24-hours restaurant with good quality of food and good services that runs morning, afternoon and night shifts.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Control Officer
Job Location: Bodija, Ibadan - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Ensuring food safety: Monitoring food handling, storage, and preparation to prevent contamination and foodborne illness.
	Maintaining consistency: Verifying that dishes are prepared according to recipes and preparation standards
	Ingredient inspection: Checking the quality and freshness of ingredients received from suppliers
	Quality control ensure monitoring raw materials usage, ensure wastage are also controlled
	Cleaning and sanitation: Overseeing the cleanliness of the kitchen, equipment and dining areas. Maintain a clean, organized, and safe working environment.
	Environment Hygiene: Quality control / supervisor ensure environment is in good condition, everywhere must be neat and ensure all utensils were clean also ensure daily cleaning must be done.
	Employee Training: Educating staff on quality of products from suppliers and recommending changes if necessary. Implement quality control procedure
	Menu development: Collaborating with chefs and management to develop new menu items and improve existing ones.
	Performance monitoring and reporting
	Customer feedback: Reviewing customer comments and complaints to identify areas for improvement.
	Compliance: Ensuring the restaurant meets food safety regulations and industry standards.
	Assistance: You are to assist the cashier by working as a cashier to satisfy customer’s needs.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications.
	Avaialble to resume immediately
	Proximity to Bodija, Awolowo is preferred.


Salary
N70,000 - N100,000 / month

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position  as the subject of the mail.
